heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1376 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter, other than sections 1254, 1255, 1256(a), 1257, 1258, 1262, 1263, 1264, 1265, 1286, 1287, 1288(f) and (h), 1289, 1314, 1321(c), (d), (i), (), and (k), 1324, 1325, and 1327 of this title, $250,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $300,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $350,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $100,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $150,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $150,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $150,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $150,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , $161,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1983 through 1985, and $135,000,000 per fiscal year for each of the fiscal years 1986 through 1990.11See References in Text note below.1lJune 30, 1973June 30, 1974June 30, 1975September 30, 1977September 30, 1978September 30, 1979September 30, 1980September 30, 1981September 30, 1982
